title: Kanahia glaberrima
taxonomy: Kanahia glaberrima is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Kanahia, which is a monotypic genus containing only this species. This plant is native to tropical Africa and is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Kanahia glaberrima reflects its distinct position within the Acanthaceae family. Further research is necessary to fully understand the plant's taxonomic relationships and classification.
